description: You are a civil engineer at a road construction firm in Jefferson County, Colorado. Perform an earthwork cut/fill volume analysis for a highway corridor project using the survey data in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\JeffersonCountyProject\site_survey.csv (UTM Zone 13N) and the reference plane elevation specified in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\JeffersonCountyProject\ProjectSpec.txt. Produce a volume report at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\JeffersonCountyProject\volume_report.txt that includes the project name, date, reference plane elevation, and the computed Cut Volume (m³), Fill Volume (m³), and Net Volume (m³).

metadata.anti_gaming_note: Max partial credit = 28 (10+8+0+10) which is below pass threshold 60
